seoTitle: Does Gumroad Accept PayPal? How to Pay With It
metaDescription: Find out whether Gumroad accepts PayPal and see how to select it at checkout, log in, and complete your purchase securely.
intro: If you'd rather pay with PayPal than a credit card, Gumroad's checkout supports it as an option on many product pages. This guide shows where to find the PayPal button, how the login and confirmation flow works, and what to expect once your purchase is complete.

steps.heading: Open the product page
steps.body: Go to the Gumroad product you want to buy and review its details before checking out.

steps.heading: Start checkout
steps.body: Click the buy button to open the secure checkout form.

steps.heading: Select PayPal
steps.body: Look for the PayPal payment option on the checkout form and select it instead of entering card details.

steps.heading: Log in and confirm
steps.body: Sign into your PayPal account, choose your funding source, and approve the payment.

steps.heading: Access your purchase
steps.body: After payment completes, you'll be taken to your receipt page to access your digital files.

faq.question: Does Gumroad accept PayPal for all products?
faq.answer: PayPal availability can depend on the seller and region, so check the checkout options on the specific product page.

faq.question: Is paying with PayPal on Gumroad secure?
faq.answer: Yes, PayPal payments are processed through PayPal's own secure, encrypted checkout flow.

faq.question: Will I get a receipt if I pay with PayPal?
faq.answer: Yes, you'll receive a digital receipt with access to your purchase, just like with card payments.

faq.question: Can I use my PayPal balance instead of a linked card?
faq.answer: Yes, you can choose your preferred funding source, including your PayPal balance, during the PayPal login step.
